mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.hotword_id as hotwordId, v.vote_count as voteCount, v.create_time as createTime, h.name as hotwordName FROM hotword_vote v LEFT JOIN hotword h ON v.hotword_id = h.id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.create_time DESC

choose.when: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%H:00') as time, SUM(vote_count) as votes FROM hotword_vote WHERE hotword_id = #{hotwordId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') ORDER BY create_time
choose.otherwise: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as time, SUM(vote_count) as votes FROM hotword_vote WHERE hotword_id = #{hotwordId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY create_time

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(u.college, '未知') as college, COUNT(*) as count FROM hotword_vote v LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.hotword_id = #{hotwordId} GROUP BY u.college ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM hotword_vote WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT v.user_id as userId, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar as avatar, COUNT(*) as voteCount, SUM(v.vote_count) as totalVotes, MIN(v.create_time) as firstVoteTime, MAX(v.create_time) as lastVoteTime FROM hotword_vote v LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) GROUP BY v.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minVotes} ORDER BY voteCount DESC
